name: Create PO via UI, approve, create linked bill, verify in vendor profile

steps.name: Click locator('.chakra-form-control, [role="group"], .flex-col, div').filter({ has: getByText(/^Purchase Order Date\s*\*?$/i) }).filter({ has: locator('button') }).last().locator('button').first()
Scroll into view getByRole('button', { name: 'Vendor selector' })
Scroll into view getByRole('button', { name: 'Quotes selector' })
Query count locator('button, div[role="group"], [role="option"], [role="menuitem"]').filter({ hasText: /^QTE\/\d{4}/ }).filter({ visible: true })
Scroll into view getByRole('button', { name: 'Accounts Payable selector' })
Scroll into view getByRole('button', { name: 'Purchase Type selector' })
Scroll into view getByRole('button', { name: 'Discount Term selector' })
Scroll into view getByRole('dialog').last().getByRole('button', { name: 'G/L Account selector' })
Wait for selector locator('p, span, div, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5').filter({ hasText: /^PO\/\d{4}\// }).first()
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Vendor selector' })

Wait for selector locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()

Click locator('.chakra-popover__content, [role="listbox"], .chakra-menu__list, div[data-placement]').filter({ visible: true }).last().getByText('MOENCO S.C', { exact: true }).first()

Wait for selector locator('div[role="dialog"], .chakra-modal__content, .chakra-popover__content, .chakra-input__group').filter({ visible: true }).last().locator('input:enabled:not([type="number"]):not([type="hidden"]):not([type="checkbox"]):not([type="radio"])').filter({ visible: true }).first()

Click locator('.chakra-form-control, [role="group"], .flex-col, div').filter({ has: getByText(/^Invoice Date\s*\*?$/i) }).filter({ has: locator('button') }).last().locator('button').first()
